title: [Certain modern methods for the diagnostics of gunshot injuries].
author_string: Makarov, I Yu, Bogomolov, D V, Gyul'mamedova, N D, Shai, A N
abstract: The objective of the present work was the analysis of the literature publications concerned with the modern approaches to the diagnostics of gunshot injuries with special reference to the most promising applications of the immunohistochemical methods. The use of certain antibodies for determining of intravitality and prescription of gunshot injuries is illustrated by concrete examples. It is concluded that further studies on the possibilities for the application of the immunohistochemical methods are needed.
